Q. who have make thou , and all thing else ? A. God . Q. what be God ? A. a spirit almighty and eternal one in essence , three in person , father , son , and holy ghost . Q. wherefore have he make thou ? A. to know he , worship he , and serve he . Q. how be he know ? A. by his work , and word . Q. how must he be worship ? A. in Spitit and truth . Q what be that truth ? A. his holy word contain the law and gospel . Q. what be the law ? A. that which be comprehend in the ten commandment . Q. what do God require of we in they ? A. love to God in the first four : and love to our neighbour in the six last . Q. how be God to be love ? A. with all the heart , with all the soul , and with all the mind . Q. how shall thou know when thou do so ? A. if i prefer his glory , and worship before all thing . Q. how be our neighbour love ? A. if we do to he as we shall be do unto . Q. do any man herein satisfy the law ? A. no , and therefore all be conclude under sin . Q. what then become of all man ? A. they be all curse to perpetual death which do it not , and none do it . Q. how then be we deliver from the curse of death and sin ? A. by Jesus Christ who keep the law and be accuse for we . Q. how know thou this ? A. by the gospel . Q. what be the gospel ? A. the power of God to salvation , proclaim forgiveness of sin to every believer through Christ . Q. what be Christ ? A. the son of the live God our saviour , our anoint , because he be king , priest , and prophet . Q. why a king ? A. to reign and rule over we . Q. why a prophet ? A. to teach we his father will . Q. why be he a priest ? A. because he have sacrifice for we . Q. what have he sacrifice for we ? A. that part of himself which suffer . Q. do Christ then suffer but in part ? A. no , for consist of godhead and manhood , his manhood only suffer . Q. what suffer he in soul ? A. hellish torment to acquit our soul . Q. what suffer he in body ? A. death temporal , to deliver we from death eternal . Q. do he then give body for our body , and soul for our soul ? A. yes very . Q. how know thou this to be for thou ? A. by the certifficate of God spirit , faith and the sacrament . Q. why , what do god spirit certify they ? A. that i be the son of God . Q. what do faith ? A. purify my heart , assure the same that Christ with his merit be make mine . Q. how can this be ? A. all my sin become he , and his righteousness become i . Q. whereof come this faith ? A. by hear and hear by the word of God . Q. how be this faith strengthen and increase in we ? A. by the word preach and by the sacrament Q how many sacrament be there ? A. two , baptism and the supper of the lord . Q. what be the sign in baptism ? A. water . Q. what be the thing signify ? A. Christ his blood cleanse we from our sin . Q. what benefit have we by baptism ? A. incorporation into the visible church , assurance of God grace and promise : and that as water do wash away the filthiness of our body , so by Christ we be wash away from all evil , both of body and soul , teach we our new birth . Q. what benefit have you by the supper of the lord ? A. we be teach Christ his death , it seal up god promise unto we , and teach we to love one another . Q. what be the part of these sacrament ? A. visible sign and invisible grace . Q. what be the visible sign ? A. bread and wine . Q. what be the invisible grace . A. full redemption and justification by Jesus Christ ? Q. why be there use both bread and wine ? A. to teach we that Christ be both our meat and drink . Q. the bread then be not Christ body ? A. no , for the heaven hold his body until the day of the resurrection of all thing , but the bread represent his body , as the wine do his blood , see that by one oblation he have consecrate for ever those that be sanctify . Q. then mass be blasphemous , and massmonger , and such as seek salvation by work , be likewise blasphemous ? A. they be so , for they rest not only on this sacrifice . Q. must not then work be do ? A. yes , but not the work of our will , but such as God have command ; and then to have no trust in they , for when we have do all that we can we be unprofitable servant . Q. how must we come to this supper ? A. in examination of our self , whether we have a godly sorrow for our sin past , and purpose of a new life . second , whether we have faith to take hold of Christ and his righteousness . third , whether we have love , declare we one body . four , whether we be thankful to God for his benefit .
